description: Archived completed tasks — M.E.R.L.I.N. Studio Bot

archived.title: Fix run.day counter: increment per card in resolve_choice()
archived.notes: Added CARDS_PER_DAY := 5 to merlin_constants.gd (line 76). In store_run.gd resolve_choice(): after cards_played increment, compute cp = cards_played, if cp>0 and cp%CARDS_PER_DAY==0 then run['day']+=1. Day initializes at 1 in init_run(). PAT-041 added.

(2) merlin_llm_adapter.gd: build_narrative_context line 708 now uses meta.get('faction_rep',{}).duplicate(); build_context line 729 adds var meta from state and uses meta.get('faction_rep',{}). (3) event_category_selector.gd: injected dominant_faction from BIOMES[biome] into enriched_run for biome-based routing (director q-20260413-002). context_builder.gd and merlin_omniscient.gd were already correctly using meta.faction_rep from prior cycles.

archived.title: Fix: move mg_sang_froid from GAMES[vigueur] to GAMES[esprit] in registry
archived.description: Bible s.6.2 + catalogue: sang_froid is an ESPRIT minigame. But GAMES['vigueur'] = ['mg_combat_rituel', 'mg_sang_froid', 'mg_course'] and GAMES['esprit'] = ['mg_volonte', 'mg_apaisement', 'mg_meditation']. Esprit-field cards NEVER select mg_sang_froid (unreachable). Vigueur cards sometimes get sang_froid incorrectly. Fix: GAMES['esprit'] = ['mg_volonte', 'mg_apaisement', 'mg_sang_froid']; GAMES['vigueur'] = ['mg_combat_rituel', 'mg_course']. Leave mg_meditation.gd in place (script stays) but remove from GAMES dispatch until director approves. Also delete orphaned mg_de_du_destin.gd.uid artifact. Found by: S3-MINIGAMES-FIELD-AUDIT.
archived.notes: Fixed: GAMES['esprit']=['mg_volonte','mg_apaisement','mg_sang_froid']; GAMES['vigueur']=['mg_combat_rituel','mg_course']. mg_sang_froid now reachable from esprit-field cards (bible s.6.2 aligned). mg_meditation removed from dispatch (script preserved, pending q-20260413-004). Orphaned mg_de_du_destin.gd.uid deleted. Resolves BUG-ORPHANED-UID-CLEANUP implicitly.

archived.title: Fix reputation_changed signal: emit clamped delta not raw
archived.description: Signal emits raw unclamped delta. At faction_rep=95 + delta=+20, emits +20 instead of +5. Fix: capture old_rep = meta.faction_rep[faction] BEFORE _apply_faction_reputation(), then actual_delta = new_val - old_rep. Emit actual_delta instead of rep_delta. Confirmed FAIL in S2-CONTEXT-REGRESSION-TEST (line 598).
archived.notes: Fixed: capture old_rep BEFORE _apply_faction_reputation(), emit actual_delta = new_val - old_rep instead of raw rep_delta. Edge case verified: faction_rep=95 + delta=+20 → emit +5, not +20.

(5) mg_de_du_destin.gd.uid orphaned artifact deleted. (6) mg_meditation.gd still present as script (not deleted, pending director decision on placement).

archived.title: Verifier formule Anam cross-run: mort = anam × min(cartes/30, 1.0)
archived.description: Bible s.5.1: Anam est la monnaie cross-run (~10 runs/noeud). A la mort: gain_anam = run.anam_accumulated * min(run.cards_played / 30.0, 1.0). Verifier: (1) run.anam_accumulated est incremente correctement (non zero). (2) La formule de mort utilise min(cartes/30, 1.0) et non un cap fixe. (3) merlin_save_system.gd persiste meta.total_anam correctement. (4) reset run.anam_accumulated a 0 apres mort. Si formule manquante ou incorrecte: implementer selon bible.
archived.notes: Verified Anam formula: death ratio min(cards/30,1.0) CORRECT. Fixed double total_runs increment (was in both handle_run_end + apply_run_rewards, now only apply_run_rewards). Added fins_vues counter to meta in handle_run_end() + _get_default_profile(). Pending: ADD_ANAM card-effect bypass (BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX P10, awaiting q-20260414-001).

tasks.title: Add 7 missing SFX: card_reveal, confirm, encounter, success, fail, neutral, danger
tasks.description: S4-SFXMANAGER-AUDIT found 7 sound names called in game scripts but not registered in SFXManager._generate_all_sounds(). They silently skip (no crash, but UX degradation at key moments). Fix: (1) Add gen_ methods to SFXRecipesAmbient for each: gen_card_reveal() (card flip: mid freq click+shimmer), gen_confirm() (positive UI: low chime), gen_encounter() (tension: minor chord swell), gen_success() (minigame win: ascending arp), gen_fail() (minigame lose: descending buzz), gen_neutral() (flat beep), gen_danger() (low pulsing alarm). (2) Add all 7 names to names[] array in SFXManager._generate_all_sounds(). (3) Add volume mappings in _get_volume_for(): card_reveal/confirm→ui, encounter/danger→magic, success/fail/neutral→transition. Callers: book_cinematic.gd:76+208, broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1043, encounter_card_overlay.gd:179+181+183, tutorial_card_layer.gd:407.
tasks.notes: Added 7 gen_ methods to sfx_recipes_ambient.gd (card_reveal, confirm, encounter, success, fail, neutral, danger). Added names to SFXManager._generate_all_sounds() names array. Added volume mappings: card_reveal/confirm/neutral→ui, encounter/danger→magic, success/fail→transition. Callers in book_cinematic, broceliande_forest_3d, encounter_card_overlay, tutorial_card_layer now resolve at startup.
